lastFeature: Safety Knowledge Base — searchable catalog of 16 safety patterns, anti-patterns & mitigations with search, filter, stats, export

Matrix/2D array builtins (matrix_create, matrix_identity, matrix_transpose, matrix_add, matrix_multiply, matrix_scalar, matrix_determinant, matrix_rows, matrix_cols, matrix_get, matrix_set)

Graph coloring for Voronoi diagrams (3 algorithms, 7 palettes, SVG/HTML/JSON export)

Smart Title Generator — heuristic auto-title from conversation content (14 lang, 14 topic, 8 action detectors)

CAPTCHA Strength Scorer — 5-dimension config evaluator with score/compare/rank/suggestions

Loyalty Points Dashboard — controller + view model for points balance, rewards, history, leaderboard

Annotation Share Manager — export/import highlights & notes as shareable codes
BioBots: Cell Seeding Calculator — scaffold geometry, density conversion, serial dilution, well plate seeding, passage expansion planning
Print DNA Fingerprint — unique visual identicons with 3 styles (geometric/ring/helix), cosine similarity search, PNG export
Tissue Maturation Tracker — post-print culture timeline with logistic growth curves, 10 tissue profiles, observations, compare, export

Time Capsules — write messages to future self with timed unlock dates

Safety Profiles — save/load/compare/validate named configuration profiles with 5 builtins
Safety Knowledge Base — searchable catalog of 16 safety patterns, anti-patterns & mitigations with search, filter, stats, export

Interactive setup checklist — 8-step onboarding with progress bar, localStorage persistence, keyboard accessible

Interactive practice exercises page with 12 coding challenges (beginner to advanced, hints, solutions, progress tracking)
